svg.text: Claude Code v2.1.88: Permission Engine & YOLO Classifier Decision Tree

g.text: • Feature gating per mode in context
System: base + template + user config + bash rules
Input: tool context, rules (if any), dangerous patterns
Track in denial counter if denied
Fall back to user prompting for all
COMPLETE DECISION FLOW: Entry → Mode Selection → Rules → Classifier (2-stage) → Denial Tracking → Output
Every permission request traces one of 6 major paths through this engine
